# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  vmNamePrefix:
    type: string
    default: DevVM

variables:
  uniqueDnsName: 'uniquedns'
  
resources:
- name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
  type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  apiVersion: "2018-10-01"
  properties:
    storageProfile:
      osDisk:
        createOption: fromImage
        caching: ReadWrite
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: Standard_D2s_v3
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
      - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex()))]"
  copy:
    name: vmcopy
    count: 2
    mode: serial
- type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
  apiVersion: "2018-10<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>"
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
  properties: {}
  dependsOn:
    - "[concat('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
  copy:
    name: ipcopy
    count: 2
    mode: serial
- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: "2018-10-01"
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: NetworkInterfaceIPConfiguration
        properties:
          subnet: 
            id: "[variables('vnetID')]"
          privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
          publicIPAddress:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex()))]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[concat('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
  copy:
    name: niccopy
    count: 2
    mode: serial
